mapper.select:
SELECT b.id, b.board_type, b.title, b.content, b.author_id, b.read_count, b.group_no, b.order_no, b.depth_no, b.del_yn, b.created_at, b.updated_at, u.name AS author_name FROM board b LEFT JOIN users u ON b.author_id = u.id WHERE b.board_type = #{boardType} AND b.del_yn = 'N'
AND b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY b.group_no DESC, b.order_no ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b LEFT JOIN users u ON b.author_id = u.id WHERE b.board_type = #{boardType} AND b.del_yn = 'N'
AND b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT b.id, b.board_type, b.title, b.content, b.author_id, b.read_count, b.group_no, b.order_no, b.depth_no, b.del_yn, b.created_at, b.updated_at, u.name AS author_name FROM board b LEFT JOIN users u ON b.author_id = u.id WHERE b.id = #{rqstNo} AND b.board_type = #{boardType} AND b.del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (board_type, title, content, author_id, group_no, order_no, depth_no, del_yn, created_at) VALUES (#{boardType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{groupNo}, #{orderNo}, #{depthNo}, 'N', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_file (board_id, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size, del_yn, created_at) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, 'N', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, board_id, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size, del_yn, created_at FROM board_file WHERE id = #{fileId} AND del_yn = 'N'
SELECT id, board_id, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size, del_yn, created_at FROM board_file WHERE board_id = #{boardNo} AND del_yn = 'N'

SELECT c.id, c.board_id, c.author_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.dislike_count, c.del_yn, c.created_at, c.updated_at, u.name AS author_name FROM board_comment c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.author_id = u.id WHERE c.board_id = #{boardNo} AND c.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comment (board_id, author_id, content, del_yn, created_at) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{authorId}, #{content}, 'N', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, board_id, author_id, content, like_count, dislike_count, del_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM board_comment WHERE id = #{commentId} AND del_yn = 'N'
